\tzpentry{ID5667}{Vector Potential Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5667 introduces Vector Potential Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \nabla^2 \mathbf{A} = -\mu_0\,\mathbf{J}_M, \quad \nabla^2 \Phi_M = -\rho_M, \]
